title: ptychotis ammoides
intro: Ptychotis ammoides, also known as sea holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve gastrointestinal issues, and ease respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of ptychotis ammoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of ptychotis ammoides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies for various health issues.
